<!-- Generated by scripts/zo_build_card_grid.py from _data/cards.yml. Do not edit directly. -->

::: {.zo-card-grid .zo-card-grid-featured}
::: {.zo-card .is-published .is-special}
[![Dẫn nhập: Hàm số, sự biến thiên và đồ thị](assets/img/cards/dan_nhap.svg){.zo-card-image}](dan_nhap.qmd)

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}

:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
[Dẫn nhập: Hàm số, sự biến thiên và đồ thị](dan_nhap.qmd)
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Bài viết nền để nhìn lại hàm số như một quy luật biến thiên trước khi đi vào từng trường hợp cụ thể.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-status is-ready">Đã có bài</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

### Bản đồ các thẻ trong dự án

Thẻ đã sáng là nội dung đã có thể đọc. Thẻ mờ là nội dung đang chờ biên soạn.

### 0. Hàm hằng

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=0$](assets/img/cards/the_001.svg){.zo-card-image}

Đang biên soạn.
:::

:::
:::
:::

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=x^4-4x^3$](assets/img/cards/the_039.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

$y=x^4-4x^3$
:::

Đang biên soạn.
:::

:::

:::

### 6. Hàm phân thức bậc không trên bậc nhất (0/1)

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{1}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_050.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{1}{x-1}$](assets/img/cards/the_052.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x-1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

### 7. Hàm phân thức bậc nhất trên bậc nhất (1/1)

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x-1}{x+1}$](assets/img/cards/the_053.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x-1}{x+1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x+1}{x-1}$](assets/img/cards/the_054.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x+1}{x-1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{2x+1}{x-2}$](assets/img/cards/the_055.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{2x+1}{x-2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{ax+b}{cx+d}$](assets/img/cards/the_056.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{ax+b}{cx+d}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[C]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}

[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

:::

:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^2+1}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_059.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[C]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=-\frac{x^2+1}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_060.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=-\frac{x^2+1}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^2-1}{x-1}=x+1$](assets/img/cards/the_061.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2-1}{x-1}=x+1$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^2}{x+1}$](assets/img/cards/the_062.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2}{x+1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[C]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^2}{x-1}$](assets/img/cards/the_063.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2}{x-1}$
:::

:::

[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-body}

[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2-1}{x^2-1}=1$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^3}{x^2+1}$](assets/img/cards/the_069.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^3}{x^2+1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^3}{x-1}$](assets/img/cards/the_070.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^3}{x-1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^4}{x^2+1}$](assets/img/cards/the_071.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^4}{x^2+1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{1}{x(x-1)}$](assets/img/cards/the_072.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x(x-1)}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x-1}{x(x-1)}=\frac{1}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_073.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x-1}{x(x-1)}=\frac{1}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{(x-1)^2}{x(x-1)}=\frac{x-1}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_074.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{(x-1)^2}{x(x-1)}=\frac{x-1}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

### 10. Hàm lũy thừa & Hàm căn thức

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=x^n$](assets/img/cards/the_076.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^n$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[C]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\sqrt{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_077.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[C]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[C]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\sqrt{x-1}$](assets/img/cards/the_078.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{x-1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

:::

:::

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}

:::

:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}

:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

:::

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=e^x+1$](assets/img/cards/the_118.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^x+1$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

### 16. Hàm lai ghép

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=e^{-x}\sin x$](assets/img/cards/the_128.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

:::

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::

:::

![$y=x\sin x$](assets/img/cards/the_129.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B] [D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x\sin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{\sin x}{x}$](assets/img/cards/the_130.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{\sin x}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\sin\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)$](assets/img/cards/the_131.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sin\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=x+\sin x$](assets/img/cards/the_132.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x+\sin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\ln(\sin x)$ ($x\in(0,\pi)$)](assets/img/cards/the_133.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

Đang biên soạn.
:::

<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\sqrt{1-x^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_134.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{1-x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::

:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\sqrt{x(1-x)}$](assets/img/cards/the_135.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{x(1-x)}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x}{1+x^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_136.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x}{1+x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{x^2}{1+x^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_137.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[B]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2}{1+x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[B]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

### 17. Hàm xuất hiện trong lĩnh vực xác suất và thống kê

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=e^{-\frac{1}{2}x^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_138.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}

:::

Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=e^{-\lvert x\rvert}$](assets/img/cards/the_139.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^{-\lvert x\rvert}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{1}{1+x^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_140.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{1+x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{e^{-x}}{(1+e^{-x})^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_141.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{e^{-x}}{(1+e^{-x})^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\frac{1}{x}e^{-\frac{1}{2}(\ln x)^2}$](assets/img/cards/the_142.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x}e^{-\frac{1}{2}(\ln x)^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::

[D]
:::

### 20. Phụ lục học thuật

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\Gamma(x)$](assets/img/cards/the_155.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::

::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\Gamma(x)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-note}
Đang biên soạn.
:::

::: {.zo-card-meta}
<span class="zo-card-badge">[D]</span><span class="zo-card-status is-waiting">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
![$y=\operatorname{erf}(x)$](assets/img/cards/the_156.svg){.zo-card-image}

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-eyebrow}
[D]
:::
